summary: Comprehensive testing of BC PO Response Capture feature (iteration_78). All 19 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/bc-response records BC processing result (created/rejected/pending) with bc_po_number, bc_document_id, bc_response_notes. Auto-creates submission log entry with mapped status (createdâ†’acknowledged, rejectedâ†’failed, pendingâ†’submitted). PO draft detail shows BC response info when set. PO Drafts list shows bc_response_status badge and bc_po_number. Item detail last_po_draft includes bc_po_number and bc_response_status.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - cosmetic, non-blocking (same as previous iterations)

passed_tests: Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/bc-response - records 'created' status with bc_po_number and bc_document_id
Backend: PATCH bc-response - records 'pending' status with optional notes
Backend: PATCH bc-response - rejected status requires bc_response_notes (422 without)
Backend: PATCH bc-response - rejected status succeeds with notes provided
Backend: PATCH bc-response - invalid status returns 422
Backend: PATCH bc-response - nonexistent draft returns 404
Backend: BC response 'created' auto-creates log with status 'acknowledged'
Backend: BC response 'rejected' auto-creates log with status 'failed'
Backend: BC response 'pending' auto-creates log with status 'submitted'
Backend: Auto-created submission log includes bc_payload_snapshot
Backend: PO draft detail returns bc_response_status, bc_po_number, bc_document_id, bc_response_at, bc_response_notes
Backend: PO Drafts list returns bc_response_status and bc_po_number for enriched drafts
Backend: Item detail last_po_draft includes bc_po_number and bc_response_status
Backend REGRESSION: Vendor assignment still works
Backend REGRESSION: BC export still works
Backend REGRESSION: Submission log still works
Backend REGRESSION: Create incoming supply still works
Backend REGRESSION: PO Drafts list still works
Backend REGRESSION: Balances endpoint still works
Frontend: BC Response section visible in PO Draft detail drawer when vendor assigned
Frontend: BC Response form with status select (Created/Rejected/Pending), PO Number, Doc ID, Notes inputs, Save button
Frontend: BC Response info displays status badge, PO number, doc ID, timestamp, notes after save
Frontend: BC response status badge (BC:created/rejected/pending) visible in PO Drafts list
Frontend: BC PO number visible in PO Drafts list Items column
Frontend: Submission log auto-updated with mapped status entry after BC response save
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1078-1163: PATCH /po-drafts/{id}/bc-response correctly validates status (created/rejected/pending), requires notes for rejection, updates draft with bc_response_status/bc_po_number/bc_document_id/bc_response_at/bc_response_notes, and auto-creates submission log with mapped status
Backend inventory_ledger.py Line 1079: BC_RESPONSE_TO_LOG_STATUS mapping: createdâ†’acknowledged, rejectedâ†’failed, pendingâ†’submitted
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1553-1557: Item detail /item-detail endpoint projection includes bc_po_number and bc_response_status for last_po_draft
Frontend PODraftDetailDrawer (lines 1273-1425): Manages bcRespStatus, bcPoNumber, bcDocId, bcRespNotes state, saveBcResponse function calls PATCH bc-response endpoint
Frontend BC Response section (lines 1609-1658): Shows bc_response_info when draft.bc_response_status exists, shows bc_response_form for non-archived drafts
Frontend PODraftsPanel (lines 1230, 1236): Shows bc_response_status badge with variant styling and bc_po_number in Items column

context_for_next_testing_agent: BC PO Response Capture feature fully tested. Endpoint: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/bc-response records downstream BC result with fields: bc_response_status (created|rejected|pending), bc_po_number, bc_document_id, bc_response_notes. Rejection requires notes (422 without). Auto-creates submission log entry with mapped status (createdâ†’acknowledged, rejectedâ†’failed, pendingâ†’submitted). PO draft detail enriched with bc_response_status/bc_po_number/bc_document_id/bc_response_at/bc_response_notes. PO Drafts list shows bc_response_status badge and bc_po_number. Item detail last_po_draft includes bc_po_number/bc_response_status. Frontend shows BC Response section in drawer (only when vendor assigned) with info display and form for recording new responses.

bc_response.response: Full PO draft document with bc_response_* fields populated
bc_response.auto_creates: Submission log entry with mapped status

errors.422_invalid_status: Invalid bc_response_status. Use: created, rejected, pending
errors.422_notes_required: bc_response_notes is required when status is 'rejected'
